versions.version_description: This version is adapted to standard tuning, easy to read because all parts are with chords, contains all lyrics.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: Mom In Love Daddy In Space

content:
[tab]Half-Step Down tuning
Chords Used
      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
eb|---3-----3-----5-----1-----5-----0---|
Bb|---5-----3-----6-----1-----5-----0---|
Gb|---5-----4-----7-----2-----5-----0---|
Db|---5-----5-----7-----3-----7-----2---|
Ab|---3-----5-----5-----3-----7-----2---|
Eb|---x-----3-----x-----1-----5-----0---|[/tab]


[Intro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
    I tear my heart open, I sew myself shut[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
  My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
  Drunk and I'm feeling down[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
And I just wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
I'm pissed cause you came around[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Why don't you just go home[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause you channel all your pain[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]
And I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You're making me insane[/tab]

All I can say is


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
  I tear my heart open, I sew myself shut[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
  And our scars remind us that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]


[Verse] 
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I tried to help you once[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Against my own advice[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I saw you going down[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
But you never realized[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
So I offered you my hand[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Compassions in my nature[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Tonight is our last stand[/tab]

 I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
